package handler

import (
    "database/sql"
    "net/http"
    "os"

    "acme/project/internal/models"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

type UserRepo interface {
    FindByEmail(email string) error
}

type AuditRepo interface {
    Record(event string) error
}

type Handler struct {
    db        *sql.DB
    gormDB    *gorm.DB
    userRepo  UserRepo
    auditRepo AuditRepo
}

func (h *Handler) Create(c *gin.Context) {
    var payload models.User
    _ = os.Getenv("FEATURE_USER_CREATE")
    _ = h.db.QueryRow("SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?", "x")
    tx := h.gormDB.Begin()
    _ = tx
    h.gormDB.Where("email = ?", "x").First(&payload)
    if h.userRepo != nil {
        _ = h.userRepo.FindByEmail("x")
    }
    if h.auditRepo != nil {
        _ = h.auditRepo.Record("created")
    }
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&payload)
    c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, payload)
}
